params.SpellDescription: Add {C}. Put a point counter on CARDNAME.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add {C}. Put a point counter on CARDNAME.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever a creature deals combat damage to you, remove a point counter from CARDNAME.
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to an opponent, put a point counter on CARDNAME. Then if it has ten or more point counters on it, remove them all and that player loses the game.
